## Task

Describe the small change (docs, test, typo, example).

## Why it's good for newcomers

- [ ] Clear acceptance criteria
- [ ] No production deploy required
- [ ] Tests or docs only

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Change implemented
- [ ] `ruff check src tests` passes
- [ ] Relevant tests pass
